summary: Public roadmap for turning the comparison library into a repeatable decision-support platform.

items.title: Public comparison library
items.outcome: Visitors can browse validated comparison pages with explicit lenses, causal chains, verdicts, and markdown exports.
items.proof: Static Pages deployment, sitemap, feed, library index, and public health checks.

items.title: Audience signal loop
items.outcome: Signals from requests, comments, saves, shares, and conversions can decide which comparisons expand into deeper assets.
items.proof: Signal rollup, expansion decisions, expansion packs, and issue templates.

items.title: Roadmap and release trace
items.outcome: Visitors can inspect what has shipped, what is planned, and how the platform is changing over time.
items.proof: Public changelog, public roadmap page, markdown exports, sitemap entries, and health checks.

items.title: Request-to-publish workflow
items.outcome: Approved GitHub comparison requests can move from draft to validated public comparison with clearer operator checkpoints.
items.proof: Request ingest, promotion runbook, lifecycle comments, and validation gates.

items.title: Paid custom comparison reports
items.outcome: High-signal comparisons can convert into custom reports with stronger evidence boundaries and reusable delivery assets.
items.proof: Lead magnet outlines, custom report samples, and source requirement metadata.
